name: Creme Cheese Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a square pan, 8x8x2 inches.
3. Beat together the brown sugar and margarine until fluffy.
4. Stir in the Bisquick baking mix and chopped walnuts until the mixture is crumbly. Set aside 1 cup of this mixture.
5. Press the remaining mixture into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 12 minutes.
7. In a separate bowl, mix together the cream cheese, granulated sugar, lemon juice, milk, vanilla, and egg until smooth.
8. Spread the cream cheese mixture over the baked layer in the pan.
9. Sprinkle the reserved crumbly mixture on top.
10. Bake for an additional 25 minutes or until the center is firm.
11. Cut into about 2-inch squares.
12. Store cookies in the refrigerator.
NOTE: For high altitude cooking (3500 to 6500 ft), preheat oven to 375°F.
